---
title: "FEN Economics Workshop"
---

<style>
.banner-caption {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #666;
  margin-top: 0.35rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.important-dates-table,
.important-dates-table th,
.important-dates-table td {
  border: none !important;
}

.important-dates-table {
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

.important-dates-table th,
.important-dates-table td {
  padding: 0.35rem 1.25rem 0.35rem 0;
}
</style>

![](images/banner.jpg)

<p class="banner-caption">The triumph of Death - Pieter Bruegel “the Elder”, Ca. 1562</p>

## The Economics of Social Conflict:
Historical Insights and New Evidence

**Date:** November 26–2, 2026  
**Location:** University of Chile - [Faculty of Economics and Business](https://fen.uchile.cl/en/home/) / Santiago / Chile  

This workshop focuses on research in economic history that examines the origins, dynamics, and consequences of social conflict in a broad sense, encompassing both societal disputes among groups and large-scale armed conflicts.

## Important dates

<table class="important-dates-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Event</th>
      <th>Date</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Submission deadline</td>
      <td>15 August 2026</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Notification of acceptance</td>
      <td>30 August 2026</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Confirmation deadline</td>
      <td>20 September 2026</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Workshop dates</td>
      <td>26–27 November 2026</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Keynote speakers

- Michela Giorcelli, UCLA
- Andy Ferrara, University of Pittsburgh
- Roya Talibova, Harvard Kennedy School

## Organizers

- [Francisco Pino](https://www.franciscopino.com/Site/Home.html), Department of Economics, University of Chile
- [Ariadna Jou](https://www.ariadnajou.com/), Department of Economics, University of Chile

## Contact

For questions, please contact:
[few@fen.uchile.cl](mailto:few@fen.uchile.cl)
